nodes.label: AI as delegable task performer for menial work
nodes.label_negative: AI requiring micromanagement or failing at simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I would probably delegate the completed task for it to handle independently

nodes.label: AI as title generation reliever of creative pressure
nodes.label_negative: Manual title creation causing perfectionist freeze
nodes.grounding_span: By asking the AI to generate article titles for me, it takes the pressure off myself

nodes.label: AI as threat to junior skill development
nodes.label_negative: AI as enabler of learning through menial tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If AI is now taking over that skillset, how will new people learn the craft?

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and fact-based content partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as creator of insights or advice (risky)
nodes.grounding_span: I can see myself using it more for brainstorming and maybe even creating new content as long as that content is fact-based

nodes.label: AI as gap filler for reduced team capacity
nodes.grounding_span: I need to rely on AI to fill in some of the gaps

nodes.label: Efficiency and workload management
nodes.grounding_span: I'm expected to do everything, from the high level tasks to the low level ones

nodes.label: Creative ease and reduced mental pressure
nodes.grounding_span: it takes the pressure off myself

nodes.label: Career development and skill acquisition for newcomers
nodes.grounding_span: I learned by doing menial, easier tasks and built my skillset from there

nodes.label: Reputational safety and compliance
nodes.grounding_span: We also don't use AI to create any articles that contain financial advice since that might get us into trouble

nodes.label: Confidence in delegating simple tasks to AI
nodes.grounding_span: I'm mostly confident that the AI can handle them without me needing to micromanage it

nodes.label: Pleasant surprise at AI's title generation quality
nodes.grounding_span: I was really pleasantly surprised with how well the AI was able to analyze the gist of the article

nodes.label: Worry about AI replacing junior roles
nodes.grounding_span: I do worry about junior roles being take over by AI

nodes.label: Openness to expanding AI use for brainstorming and fact-based content
nodes.grounding_span: I can see myself using it more for brainstorming and maybe even creating new content

nodes.label: Selection from multiple options rather than iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: ask it to prove me with a list of results and I choose the best ones from there

nodes.label: Boundary-setting based on expertise and risk
nodes.grounding_span: I perform editing tasks myself because I am a fast and efficient editor with decades of expertise
